title: Hakoniwa Force/Torque sensor profile
description: SDF-like but MJCF-resolved JSON config for Force/Torque sensor profiles used by Hakoniwa MuJoCo sensors.

frame_id.description: The coordinate frame this sensor is attached to.

update_rate.description: The frequency at which the sensor generates data, in Hz.

joint_name.description: The name of the joint to monitor for forces and torques.

frame.description: The frame in which the measurements are expressed.

measure_direction.description: The direction of the measured force/torque.
